objectives:
Understand what is Information Systems Management
	Why it is fundamental to define requirements
	Know how to develop and manage a methodology of defining and structure requirements
	How to align the tests with the requirements
	Understand the importance of modelling the requirements and tests
	Project Management Fundamentals
organicUnit: ECATI - School of Communication, Architecture, Arts and Information Technologies
programme:
Structure of main content chapters


	Information Systems Management Vision
	Requirements Engineering (Backlog, BPMN and UML management - Modeling)
	Software Testing  
	Project Management
presentation: The Systems Analysis and Design UC aims to ensure an information systems management framework and its impact on the application component, where the requirements methodology and engineering component, such as software testing methodology and structuring, are unitary or aggregate, are essential for companies' business success.
avaliacao:
•Theory – 50%

–Participation – 5%

–Online Quizzes during classes - 10%

–Group work + presentation - 15%

–Final Exam - 20%

•Projects – 50%

–2 projects: IaaS, PaaS, SaaS, BaaS

–Rules for the pratical component grade will be explained by professor Rui Santos & Luis Gomes

Minimum grade in each component 9,5 values in 20.
